parents.subject: LU-14947 tests: recovery-small 26b to create file on MDT0

commit.subject: LU-19242 tests: fix recovery-small test_26b
commit.message:
LU-19242 tests: fix recovery-small test_26b

The client is not being evicted in test_26b due to changes in
the calculation of pint evictor timeouts.  Try to bring the
timeout used by the test in sync with the recent changes.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=recovery-small env=ONLY=26b,ONLY_REPEAT=30
Test-Parameters: testlist=recovery-small env=ONLY=26b,ONLY_REPEAT=30
Test-Parameters: testlist=recovery-small env=ONLY=26b,ONLY_REPEAT=30
Test-Parameters: testlist=recovery-small env=ONLY=26b,ONLY_REPEAT=30
Fixes: 0498ab0fd6 ("LU-18878 ptlrpc: evictor/prolong timeout formula fix")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I0d90132f0241f08d8230e58d8abb1a9886e3193c
